description: incident.io is an incident management platform for handling incidents, alerts, on-call schedules, status pages, workflows, and related operational data. It helps teams coordinate response work and automate incident-related processes across their tooling.
summary: incident.io exposes a bearer-token HTTP API at https://api.incident.io/ and a hosted MCP server at https://mcp.incident.io/mcp; no public GraphQL API or developer CLI was found.
